programs.title: Today
programs.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programs.title: Today Extra
programs.desc: An exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, live music performances, and the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programs.title: 9News Morning
programs.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programs.title: The Floor
programs.desc: 40 players are still vying for the $200,000 grand prize. A returning dueller cements his place on the floor.

programs.title: Destination WA
programs.desc: On todays show, Trevor explores the Fishing Serrurier Island, uncovering crystal waters, rich marine life and rugged coastline beauty in an unforgettable WA adventure across the pristine offshore paradise. More adventures await across WA!

programs.title: My Way
programs.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story about how they live their best life. It's a lifestyle program that allows people to tell their own stories firsthand to say, 'I'm doing this My Way'.
